domain: rugged field cases, emergency-response equipment, non-weapon protective/service hardware, and rescue-tool accessories

ideas.idea_title: Rugged Waterproof Drone Battery Transit Case
ideas.product_context: Field teams transporting spare UAV batteries for search mapping, inspection, or disaster assessment.
ideas.core_function: Protects multiple battery packs from impact, water ingress, and accidental terminal contact during transport.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined internal battery tray with isolated pockets, drain channels, and lid-compression bosses.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires repeated pocket geometry, clearance spacing, rounded protective ribs, gasket compression features, and asymmetric terminal-protection details.

ideas.product_context: Emergency medical vehicles where exposed oxygen regulators need protection from bumps and equipment collisions.
ideas.core_function: Shields a regulator while allowing gauge visibility, hose routing, and quick access for adjustment.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined protective cage bracket with rail clamp interface, window cutouts, and hose pass-throughs.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines clamp geometry, protective openings, standoff ribs, rounded edges, and constrained access zones around a delicate device.

ideas.product_context: Swift-water rescue personnel carrying throw bags on modular belts or buoyancy vests.
ideas.core_function: Holds a rescue rope throw bag securely while allowing one-handed release under wet conditions.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined quick-release belt dock with curved cradle, latch pocket, and drainage slots.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests curved retention surfaces, ergonomic release geometry, slot arrays, water-drain features, and attachment interfaces.

ideas.product_context: Disaster-response crews carrying portable radios in rough terrain or temporary command posts.
ideas.core_function: Protects a handheld or compact base radio from drops while keeping controls and ports accessible.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined corner-frame shell with elastomer insert pockets, exposed control windows, and lanyard anchors.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires offset frames, corner bosses, recessed insert cavities, port cutouts, and nonuniform protective wall thickness.

ideas.product_context: Rescue stretchers used in field extraction, industrial sites, and emergency shelters.
ideas.core_function: Reinforces a folding stretcher hinge while preserving lock alignment and smooth deployment.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined hinge block with dual pivot bores, lock-pin channel, stop faces, and weight-reduction pockets.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests coaxial holes, load-bearing bosses, mechanical stops, pocketing, and tight alignment constraints.

ideas.idea_title: Portable Decontamination Shower Hose Manifold Bracket
ideas.product_context: Emergency hazmat or disaster sites using temporary decontamination shower systems.
ideas.core_function: Organizes and supports multiple hose connections while keeping valves protected and readable.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined manifold support plate with angled hose ports, valve guards, mounting tabs, and labeling recesses.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Includes angled cylindrical features, repeated port spacing, protective raised ribs, shallow engraving zones, and mount-hole patterns.

ideas.idea_title: Hard Case Insert for Thermal Imaging Camera Kit
ideas.product_context: Fire, rescue, and inspection teams storing a thermal camera, spare battery, charger, and cable set.
ideas.core_function: Keeps sensitive imaging equipment organized and protected inside a rugged field case.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined or milled foam-compatible insert master with camera-shaped cavity, accessory wells, and finger-lift reliefs.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests nested organic-adjacent cavities, varied-depth pockets, filleted finger cutouts, labeling pads, and case-alignment features.

ideas.product_context: Emergency crews transporting powered rescue saws separately from consumable abrasive or carbide blades.
ideas.core_function: Protects circular blades from edge damage and protects users from accidental contact during storage.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined circular blade guard plate with central hub lock, radial ribs, and indexed blade-size stops.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires concentric circular geometry, radial reinforcement, hub-lock details, stepped diameter references, and edge-clearance channels.

ideas.idea_title: Temporary Command Post Cable Crossover Protector
ideas.product_context: Emergency operations centers with power, radio, and network cables crossing walkways.
ideas.core_function: Protects cables from foot traffic and reduces trip hazards in temporary field setups.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined modular cable-channel segment with interlocking ends, ribbed ramp surfaces, and underside grip pockets.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests long channel profiles, interlocking male-female geometry, patterned traction ribs, underside cavities, and modular repeatability.

ideas.product_context: Rescue workers mounting high-output headlamps to helmets without permanent modification.
ideas.core_function: Provides a secure adjustable interface between helmet accessory slots and a lamp body.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined adapter bracket with slotted adjustment arc, helmet-clip hooks, lamp pivot boss, and cable-retention groove.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines hook geometry, pivot bosses, curved slots, thin retention features, and compact ergonomic clearances.
